steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is B, $4$.

steps.title: Isolate the absolute value
steps.content:
Subtract 61 from both sides of the equation:
$$|p| + 61 = 65$$
$$|p| = 65 - 61 = 4$$

steps.title: Solve for p
steps.content: The absolute value equation $|p| = 4$ has two solutions: $p = 4$ and $p = -4$. Looking at the answer choices, only 4 appears as an option. B is correct.
